entry.title: HowTo: S4H Public Cloud app to start iFlow in SAP CPI by enduser.
entry.content:
Dears,

I kindly ask for idea how to start existing iFlow in SAP CPI from S4H Public Cloud via tail or any other possibility - which way to choose.

Scenario: User opens tail (or something "else") in S4HC, fill some parameters like dates, etc, push button like "Start". This will trigger iFlow in SAP CPI and will pass filled parameters. 

Any idea is appreciated.

Thanks a lot.

Roman

entry.title: Re: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content: If you want to change the contents displayed in the ALV, you must change the global internal table passed to the parameter T_OUTTAB (TT_RDATA), as after the refresh the display will reflect the internal table. "Insert New Record", "Update" and so on should update the internal table, not the database table. Of course, you may do the changes at both, but the screens are usually designed to have a SAVE button to transfer the screen data to the database table(s).

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Dear @diego_renzi,

this is a situation that should not happen. Unfortunately at this point it is hard to judge whether the issue is caused by an incorrect configuration of the deployed SAP Build Apps application added to SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition or an actual defect on Work Zone and the underlying services itself.

We would suggest opening an official customer ticket to the component EP-WZ-NAV adding the information stated in SAP Note 3541023. Especially the mentioned Mobile Network Trace will help to figure out the cause for the observed issue. If you struggle opening such a support ticket, you may reach out to sapmobilestart@sap.com alternatively.

Kind regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content: The back button is handled in standard, you don't have to do anything for '&F03'. The problem is probably that when leaving the ALV, you are asking at the same time to refresh the ALV screen, hence you are confusing ALV about what you really want to do.

entry.title: Re: Optimization on SELECT Statement using SORTED INTERNAL Table
entry.content:
1) A table sorted by declaration doesn't make SELECT go faster. SELECT is executed by the database. Sorted tables are faster only for ABAP read statements.

2) I don't know how you have made sure that the root cause was the SELECT itself. What is the time of execution of this SELECT? Maybe it's another part of your code? Please share SAT information and possibly the concerned execution plan if the issue is about SQL (the issue may also be an ABAP problem which loops at this SELECT, so the solution would be to take the SELECT out of the ABAP loop).

entry.title: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content:
Hello,

I am taking 'Acquiring Core ABAP Skills' course at the moment.
I can't find /LRN/.. courses.
I checked the following posts:

I tried using various search terms, but didn't help.
Any idea is appreciated.

Thanks
Laszlo

So how do you do that in MASSD?

Best Regards, 
Gitte Greibe.

entry.title: Re: Overview of all GenAI Options in SAP Build Code

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content: Here: SAP Universal ID Account Manager

entry.title: Re: Account is currently blocked by user RFC_ALE during I...
entry.content: @newguy_cloud It doesn't make sense. Why don't you recommend this answer to your team mate now?

entry.title: How SAP Public Cloud Customize MRP Logic?
entry.content:
Hello, Experts

My client has a requirement that they want some of their unplanned orders to be excluded from MRP calculations because they use MTS and independent demand to manage production, and unplanned orders for R&D interfere with their management of supplies.

Of course, the first option is the MRP area feature, but given that they have not enabled it and that setting it up at this point may result in increased maintenance costs for the material data later on, they would like to consider being able to modify the MRP logic so that it doesn't run specific types of orders.

I know that it is possible to make changes to the MRP logic in S4 or ECC, but I haven't found a way to do so in the public cloud version, so I would like to ask the experts here if it is possible to implement this change and if so how should I do it?

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Tlanes are not getting created
entry.content:
Hi kannanGK,

-check SMQ2 (Inbound Queue) if there are any signs of failed transfer.
-check /SAPAPO/CCR t-code if there are any signs of failed transfer.
-check /SAPAPO/CPP t-code if there are any signs of failed transfer.
-check SLG1 t-code, Object: CIFSCM if there are any errors 

Let the thread know, so we can help better.

Br

Geri

entry.title: Hana studio version 2.3.71 - Copy the structure of composite provider
entry.content:
HI,

I'm flabbergosted because I want to copy from structure A to structure B of composite provider but there is not have the function ' save as' when I right click on the structure A.

How to copy the structure B by reference the strucutre A ?

Thanks

Bastien

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...

Thanks Sandra,

But, it not Show my Yahoo Mail in Linked Section ?

entry.title: Re: Error During Preview Application for Fiori Tools Gene...
entry.content: For now as a workaround, just stop and start the instance, it will work.

entry.title: Re: 3/3 From JavaScript to TypeScript: The Shocking Results of Our SAPUI5 Transformation
entry.content:
@PetrBecka, a great series of blog posts!

I fully agree on TypeScript being game changer (I also blogged about this last year) and it will always be my preferred choice of the many reasons you provided.

Another positive side-effect of using TypeScript was, that it opened up my view for modern JavaScript in general. Even plain old JavaScript is very powerful today and using TypeScript really helped me to look closer at the modern language features and re-use them in UI5 projects (I talked about this in more detail on UI5con).

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content: Course URL: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills . Where did you see a mention to the /LRN/ courses?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports and SOS Legal
entry.content: You may post this question in sos legal forum, as they have sql report builder, they would be able to answer if they have connector for CR, thanks.

entry.title: Request for Quotation & Contracts in Fieldglass system
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

I would like to inquire about specific functionalities available in the SAP Fieldglass system, and I was wondering if you could also provide any relevant Help Portal links for further reference.

  1. Request for Quotation (RFQ):
    Does Fieldglass support a process where a request for quotation can be created and sent to multiple vendors to obtain price quotes? If so, could you provide details on how this process works within the system?

  2. Contract Creation in SOW:
    As part of the Statement of Work (SOW) process, does Fieldglass have functionality to create contracts? And that contact will be reference for multiple other documents If this is available, I would appreciate any information or documentation explaining how contracts are generated and managed in the system.

Your guidance and any resources you could provide would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your support, and I look forward to your response.

Thank you so much.

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content: Contact sso@sap.com

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay-Payout curves-Interpolation
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec-Thanks for the clarification. Will wait to see your updated blog.

entry.title: Re: Data truncation with export to pdf
entry.content:
Thanks for the response, umasaral.

We verified the font settings in Windows registry for both Dev and Server. See below screenshot.

And for the SAP's SP point of view, the server has latest SP37 compared to dev which has SP30.

In server, having latest SAP SP, it should not give these kind of issues.

It looks the problem is with fonts as above first screenshot but no idea how to get over this data truncation issue.

Any other thoughts, kindly let us know.

Thanks and Regards.

entry.title: If data deleted in IAS, can we retrieve back or need to import new?
entry.content: I have deleted data person in IAS due to wrongly flow data to IAS. Can I able to flow it back or need to upload new data?

entry.title: Re: Concept of Discontinuation Data - Material Master and BOM
entry.content:
Hello,
1.
If I have no idea when the actual new item will be implemented, would it then instead be possible to use this functionality as a signal only/information only about coming supersession? Means information that Part A is to be discountinued and will be replaced by Part B (as information only). By that keep it on material level only.

By that handle the BOM update manually, the very same day when the actual implentation is, do the update of super BOM and phantom BOM with local DCN instead?

Would this be possible, and would this affect anything negative? 

2. When using this function as in this forum thread, and reduced as I describe in no 1, does this function on material level include the sales history and FC, and will that history auto be transferred from Part A to Part B (the superseding material)?

Hope you understand what I mean, thankful for any reply that might help me.

/Erik

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content:
Hello Sandra,

'Working with local classes' part has 'Task 1: Copy Template (Optional)'
Steps
Open the source code of global class/LRN/CL_S4D400_CLS_LOCAL_CLASS in the ABAP editor.
In the Eclipse toolbar, choose Open ABAP Development Object. Alternatively, press Ctrl + Shift + A.
Enter /LRN/CL_S4D400_CLS as search string.
From the list of development objects choose /LRN/CL_S4D400_CLS_LOCAL_CLASS, then choose OK.

entry.title: Authentication error while using SaaS Routes for custom domain in multitenancy
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have followed this guide to incorporate custom domains and routes for multitenant CAP application:

https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-cap-multitenant-saas/blob/main/docu/4-expert/-CloudFoundry-/custom-domain-usage/README.md

I have faced issue during performing step 6 (specifically 6.14) 

While accessing application with custom route and custom domain im facing OAuth error, it looks like application tries to access xsuaa service with Saas route name (test1234) as subscriber tenant name
https://test1234.authentication.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/oauth_error

 

When accessing same application on same subaccount without custom SaaS route (but still with custom domain), everything works properly.

What can be reason for such issue ? oauth-redirect uris and tenant_host_pattern are populated according to guide linked above.

 

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SolutionManager in Standard Support mode
entry.content: Could you please define exactly what do you mean with "does not exceed Standard Support privileges"? I work in Solution Manager support and I don't really understand the query. Maybe you would like to know more about the Solution Manager usage rights? Please check https://support.sap.com/en/alm/usage-rights.html

Vladimir

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Dear @Suzanne_Heiob 

Hello, I have a question.

Could you tell me when the certification exam questions are updated? Is it after the half-year release? I want to confirm the best timing to take the exam. This is my understanding, is that correct?

  1. Updating the exam twice a year (after the half-year release)
  2. If the deadline is March 31, 2025, will the questions remain the same whether I take it now or just before the deadline?

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: hxehost:53075 not responding
entry.content: Hi, thanks for the solution! Does somebody know how to fix this issue in the firewall settings permanently. When I start with VM again, this solution does not help me anymore. Greetings

entry.title: Re: SAP PaPM Cloud UM – Enhancing Report Management with the power of generative AI copilot – Joule
entry.content:
Hello dear @marcus_kleiner_dfmc ,

Thank you as well for your question!

At the moment, Joule is unable to retrieve specific reports based on a question and then trigger the corresponding function chain. It is currently capable of performing analysis and providing responses for specific report pages, queries related to uploaded files and queries in the Activity Show screen. However, we are working on exciting enhancements that align closely with your expectations. We’ll keep you updated once these features are released.

Kind Regards,

Milica

entry.title: Re: Hiring 2 employees on the same position, the first one is successful and the last one is failing
entry.content:
Hi, this could be due to the settings on the position. We hire employees into mass positions via Onboarding regularly. This will not relate to they way Onboarding is configured, but how the position is configured. You can check these settings on the position.

  • Mass Position: Yes
  • FTE: review this value

Regards

Frans

entry.title: CAP for Nodejs运维练习
entry.content:
本文档目的是帮助您初步了解部署在BTP上应用的基本运维方式，阅读时间约为30分钟。

 

本练习的使用前提是完成 CAP for Nodejs部署练习 - SAP Community

 

如果您对BTP感兴趣，BTP个人精选内容目录 | SAP Blogs 可能有更多你需要的内容

 

本文档为CAP for Nodejs部署练习 | SAP Blogs 的后续，本练习会展示在部署后如何进行运维

本文档包括以下部分：

1.部署完成后平台发生的变化

2.容器事件及应用日志查看

3.应用对应的身份配置

4.如何添加监控措施

 

1.部署完成后平台发生的变化

完成部署后，首先，在子账户-空间-本次部署的目标空间内的应用程序列表里，会多出三个应用

 

其中，cpapp-db-deployer应用只会在部署时启动，用于部署CAP程序内的HANA Cloud内容，cpapp-srv是我们的后端服务，approuter是装载了我们前端内容的服务，如果你同时使用了html5repo装载前端代码，则可以在子账户-HTML5应用程序内找到nsrisks2应用

 

在左侧从应用程序子菜单切换到服务-实例子菜单后，可以看到四个服务实例，其中cpapp-auth代表了身份中心，cpapp-db代表了嵌入到HANA Cloud的hdi-shared容器（详细含义请参考其他资料），

 

cpapp-destination代表了在本空间内的destination服务，点击该服务实例名称，即可进入服务实例主页，首先默认进入 引用应用 子菜单，可以看到哪些应用可以访问该服务实例；左菜单选择 目标，可以看到5个destination，分别来自mta.yaml 中module approuter properties内的srv-destination，和resources cpapp-destination内定义的cpapp-srv-api和ui5，以及系统自动生成的连接到auth和html5repo的两个destination

 

回到空间主页，左菜单的 路由，可以看到两个路由，意思就是对应两个应用程序的两个公网URL

左菜单的 空间成员 和子账户权限略有不同，这里的 空间成员 指的是Cloud Foundry内的org-space权限，有这些权限才可以配置/部署应用

 

2.容器事件及应用日志查看

部署完成后，在子账户-空间-应用主页内，可以查看到应用对应的公网url，还可以看到+实例的按钮，这里指的是实际运行应用的容器数，可以通过点击增加数量（负载均衡还是ha？），新增的每个实例会占用与旧实例一致的内存量

在左菜单的事件选项内，可以看到容器发生事件的日志记录，此处无需配置，对接的是容器底层的运行日志

在左菜单的日志选项内，暂时看不到任何内容，点击左上角的 打开Kibana 仪表盘，也不会有内容，因为logging服务没有被创建，即使被创建过了也需要和该应用绑定，并在应用内写日志到logging服务

 

 

3.应用对应的身份配置

在应用内部的左菜单的 安全性下，可以看到 范围和角色模板，其内容都来自xs-security.json内的定义

此时回到子账户-安全性-角色集合，可以看到RiskManager-dev角色集合，这里的内容是来自mta.yaml resources cpapp-auth内的。

 

4.如何添加监控措施

看过了主要的变化，接下来让我们练习如何添加监控信息

首先需要为子账户启用一个application-logs服务实例，然后要将应用与服务实例相连，可以使用命令行或者cockpit来操作

https://help.sap.com/docs/application-logging-service/sap-application-logging-service/bind-your-application-using-command-line-interface

 

简单来说，在应用部署好之后，进入子账户-目标空间后，在左菜单的 实例列表页面内点击右上角的创建，

选择application-logs服务，选择lite计划，填入实例名称后即可 点击 下一步-创建

创建完成后还是在空间内的实例列表页面点击新实例来打开右菜单，在右菜单的 绑定的应用程序 处点击创建，选择目标应用后确认创建

最后回到应用程序列表页面，点击目标应用进入应用主页后点击左菜单的日志-打开Kibana仪表盘，即可看到该应用的日志了

 

 

但更推荐直接在mta.yaml内定义该服务实例以及绑定：

在resources部分添加：

  - name: cf-logging

    type: org.cloudfoundry.managed-service

    parameters:

      service: application-logs

      service-plan: lite

 

然后在需要监控的应用的require部分添加依赖即可，我这里是在cpapp-srv这个module里的requires添加了一条      - name: cf-logging

 

然后是在应用内添加监控：

进入srv/risk-service.js

第二行添加：

const generalLOG = cds.log('generalLOG')

 

然后在你想记录日志的地方添加

generalLOG.info ('generalLOG', test)

 

Nodejs请参考：

About | CF Node.js Logging Support

 

Java请参考：

Home · SAP/cf-java-logging-support Wiki · GitHub

entry.title: Release period & Product availability
entry.content:
Hello,

I want to start using the automated release of production orders by setting up an automated Job that triggers based on the "Scheduled Release" date.  However, I've noticed that component availability is checked for the "Order Start" date rather than the "Scheduled Release" date. This creates a risk of missing parts when the automated job is triggered to release the order.

One solution I considered is setting a "Float Before Production" to push the scheduled start date earlier. This approach means I wouldn't use the "Release Period" in the scheduling margin key.

The challenge is that we produce daily outputs, which are reflected in the MRP through the distribution key (GLEI). If I set a "Float Before Production," the output gets distributed over the period before the scheduled start of operations, which isn't desirable since no output will occur in that period.

What is the best approach to address this situation while maintaining accurate production scheduling and material availability?

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @kamala13 to my knowledge SAPforMe is not able to show the updated expiry dates - as far as I am aware the team is working on it but there are also banners on SAPforMe informing about this missing information. Please look into SAP Learning for the most precise expiration dates.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Bank Account number is truncated the Custom CDS View.
entry.content:
1. Custom CDS View do not give the correct results for the bank account number.
  2. Truncated bank account number is displayed in the Custom CDS View preview.
  3. Only 18 characters of the bank account number is displayed in the Custom CDS View display.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Bank Account number is truncated the Custom CDS View.
entry.content: Please, find the analysis given in the SAP KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3560190

entry.title: Re: SAP EWM Deployment Options – embedded vs decentral warehouse management
entry.content: Great Read !! Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Hi @its_naoki,

Please find here the answer to your questions:

  1. Updating the exam twice a year (after the half-year release) -> it is depending on the solution or topic you are certified in how often the exam will be updated. Most of our cloud solution exams update at minimum twice per year. Other solutions might update only once per year or even bi-yearly. 
  2. If the deadline is March 31, 2025, will the questions remain the same whether I take it now or just before the deadline?
    The assessment to stay certified might be updated more often than the exam. Everytime there is a new delta update you will see a new assessment being published. The assessments will be updated minimum once per year. So we highly recommend to take it now when your due date is March 31, 2025. A new one might not be published before april and we want you to keep track on the latest features and functions of the solution you are certified in.

Kind Regards, Suzanne

entry.title: Re: how to use "one time contract accounts"
entry.content:
Henk, 

Understood you are planning to integrate the SD with FICA for the receivables management, but there are certain pre-requisites as well with respect to the BPs to be in sync within FICA and SD.

If you are using a BP in SD for posting SD order and subsequently SD invoice, that BP should also exists as Contract partner role (MKK) other wise you will not be create contract account in first place. 

Secondly, with respect to one time contract account, its not going to be easy if you have to manage payment settlement process and further downstream processes, like Returns or dunning.

Its better to go by the Normal Contract account process with SD FICA integration rather than going by 1 time CA approach. 

Thanks

Amlan

 

 

 

 

Not sure which Industry solution you are in, but for Utilities and Telecom, for One Time Contract account, you can multiple BPs as account holders.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Serial Number Profile for Mandatory...
entry.content:
Hello hslee1,

Changing the serial number usage (mandatory/optional/...), by movement type is on the roadmap for Q1/2025 for S/4HANA Public Cloud, as you can see here: https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?BC=901B0ED1A0641ED9B2C72B7AC3CF60E6&range=CURRENT-LAST#;INNO=7FECA36531611EEEA0C583F4A0346E9E 

After this is released, you can e. g. set procedure MMSL (Maintain goods receipt and issue doc.) in your serial number profile to optional and just set goods movement for purchase order related entries to mandatory in the new configuration UI.

I hope this fulfils your requirement.

Best,
Alex

entry.title: Sandbox and Development Temp outside RISE landscape for S/4HANA version upgrade
entry.content:
Hi,

We have existing client who is already on RISE S/4HANA PCE and planning to upgrade to S/4HANA 2023.

The plan is to have Sandbox upgrade first and also setup temporary development to support Production system while doing upgrade project.

For these 2 temp servers required, client is asking if possible to host temp servers outside RISE system landscape ie on any of hyperscaler? If yes, for Sandbox upgrade and DEV temp setup is customer/SI responsibility and how about the connection into RISE for DEV temp and other impact to RISE we need to take into consideration?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP DM - NC Disposition on Order POD
entry.content:
HI @okakoshow ,

in the Order POD routings must use a releaxed flow: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/order-pod

There are some limitations to using this type of routing in the POD:
https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/execution/routings-with-relaxed-flow

Hope this helps.

Best,

Mike

entry.title: Re: Developing with SAP Integration Suite Learning Journe...
entry.content: i had same issue for this. based on the learning journey, we've configured the api proxy can access directly without any credential, because it is already setup before based on the learning steps.

entry.title: Re: Mass role creation and addition of tcodes to role menu
entry.content:
LSMW will help on Mass roles creation and for update Organizational/Field value, please use PFCGMASSVAL

 

Ashish Semwal

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Serial Number Profile for Mandatory...
entry.content: I just found out that the What's New and help documentation for 2502 was just released. Here's the link to the documentation for this feature: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/b3df23e28ac348d88d5cc0e0137340f9.html

entry.title: Re: Joule is Now Integrated into SAP Build Work Zone!
entry.content:
Hi @Yumnahabbasi,

We can see Joule in our WZ site and can chat with it but I've been trying out the navigational capabilities and it's not working. Is there something else that needs  to be configured? Also, do we have the list of joule capabilities for WZ? I am unable to see in SAP Help.

 

Thanks,
Airra

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification Transformation: How You Can Get and Stay Certified
entry.content:
Dear @Suzanne_Heiob,

Thank you for quick reply.

Let me confirm one more thing. For example, when it comes to Employee Central, at what points do exam details(questions) change or update? Is it after a half-year release, or is there no specific timing and exam are addressed as updates occur? According your previous answer, does it not related to half year release or any event?

Best regards,
Naoki

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - Consume local service/API in ABAP code
entry.content: Well there is /iwbep/if_cp_client_proxy and cl_web_odata_client_factory with create_v4_local_proxy and create_v2_local_proxy. Usability is however not so good but your desired goal should be achievable.

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Manager roles
entry.content:
Hi Jenny,

you should try by following the documentation here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/ff92035b3da94a14a3d2d0faffad564c.html, second point "Manage Workforce". 

Best regards,
Alejandro

entry.title: VPN Bandwidth for RDP to SAP Remote Server from Home`
entry.content:
Hi All

Our client has set up a remote server with SAP B1 client application and users outside the network can use the SAP B1 client through a VPN connection.

Any advice on the maximum acceptable latency and required bandwidth for optimizing smooth connection for the above setup? 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Re: how to use "one time contract accounts"
entry.content:
Hello Amlan,

Thanks for your reply.

We are using IS-U (Utilities) and we are aware of the prerequisites, because we are already integrating some SD orders into FI-CA.

I have also read something about multiple BP's assigned to one contract account.

One of the main reasons to get everything in FI-CA is that we are planning to implement FSCM Receivables Management.
So that is why we are investigating how we should setup / use the contract accounts.

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 2023, Assets Master Data and Posting not visible
entry.content:
Dear SAP Migration Cockpit team,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit Staging Tables. After system was upgraded to a new release On Premise 2023, the objects (Assets Master Data and Assets Posting) of this new release are not visible in existing projects.

As i can check they are available in the list of migration objects:

Available Migration Objects | SAP Help Portal

Thanks and best regards,

Desislava Dimova

entry.title: Re: Payment workflow in Public cloud
entry.content: Hi Johannes, It was possible for you create the workflow in Public Cloud for payament? Did you need to have any best practices activated before?

entry.title: Re: Payment workflow in Public cloud
entry.content: Hi Johannes, I saw the video but I didnt find the solution to public cloud. ID 102336 didnt appper in CBC. Thanks and apologies for my understanding.

entry.title: Tool to upload invoice correction request for specific selected items from referenced invoice
entry.content: Needed to upload bulk of invoice correction request for specific selected items from referenced invoice (Without copying all referenced invoice items)

entry.title: Re: Consumption/Adjusting the usage Cycle to PRT in Public Cloud
entry.content: @memem Sir, we posting Confirmations on operations on single confirmation basis.

entry.title: SAB IAS - Application IBP configuration
entry.content:
Hi team,

 

We are working on Entra ID migration for one of our IBP applications by decommissioning secure auth.

 Reply URL configured in IAS for IBP app is the same which we are using for entra ID

however after migration we are getting error as reply URL do not match. Request your suggestion on the error

SAP have embedded SAC configuration as a child

entry.title: Re: Employee Central Document Generation
entry.content:
Hi all

Can I ask, is there an option to default the generation of the documents to be Word over PDF? We don't use PDF, so have to go through the tool each time we create a document, and with that we also have to remember to select 'Word Document' as the document type. Can we default this to word instead of PDF? Or at the very least change the order of the picklist so 'Word Document' is the first option?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Dependency Formula for BOM qty
entry.content:
Hi Thomas,

thanks for the detailed explanation. I tried doing what you suggested but unfortunately its not working as of now. So i created a Class STL_CTRL of class type 300. I then created two characteristics:

1. BOM_QTY with table name STPO and field name MENGE

2. ORD_QTY with table name PLAF and field name GSMNG (to read the total quantity from the planned order)

I then assigned the two characteristics to the class STL_CTRL and assigned the class to the header material and the material i want to control the quantity of in the BOM.

I then created object dependency of type procedure with the following syntax for testing:

$self.BOM_QTY = 5 if $root.ORD_QTY > 10 (Set quantity of component to 5 if the planned order quantity of the header material is greater than 10)

Then created sales order with ord qty 20 but after MRP the component qty is also set to 20 and not 5, as i would like it to be. 

Any suggestions as to what i did wrong?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere Sample Content for FI, HR and SD
entry.content:
@silke_jahr @dspokoinyi 

We also face the same issues trying to import the data product via Data Marketplace -> Search

as well as the business content Semantic Onboarding Samples.

entry.title: Re: Error Handling with API Gateway vs Service Layer in SAP
entry.content: API accepts service layer requests, and it works perfectly when json input bdoy is valid. Only problem here is that when we have an error I can't get useful error message.

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hello,

Are there any news about the following point ?:

  • Our plans are to gradually add support for Java 21 as well as the latest version of the Apache TomEE runtime (adding support for even more Jakarta EE technologies). 

Are there any plans about adding TomEE runtime in  SAP Java Buildpack 2?

 

Best regards,

Kristiyan

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Item is not matched to Invoice Item in...
entry.content:
Dear Niklas, 

the prerequisite for line item matching is that there is a PO reference on the invoice and it got recognized by OCR. The mentioned note (3540020) is not stating anything else, so it's a misunderstanding that matching can happen without the prior identification of at least one PO reference on the invoice. The matching then tries to determine the best matching candidates out of all line items of the referenced PO(s) based on unit price, description and quantity. I hope this explanation clarifies why your example did not work. 

Best regards

Linda

entry.title: Leave of Absence - Employee status
entry.content:
Hello,

We are seeing issues with employee status for employees on Leave of absence; The employee's status updates to align with the compensation change date, even if their actual return is in the future. 

For instance, if we have an employee on leave of absence (LOA) scheduled to return in January, but there is a compensation change effective December 1, 2024, the employee's status in the job information portlet will update to "unpaid leave" effective from December 1, 2024.

Any ideas or pointers to what could be causing this. 

Thank you

Priya

entry.title: Re: LE-TRA versus Transportation Management
entry.content:
Hello @Peter2408 

Delivery integration is customized in SPRO: Transportation Management -> Integration -> Logistics Integration -> Internal TM Component Integration -> Define Transportation Relevance of Delivery Documents.

Freight units can be created either immediately when a TM relevant document e.g. a sales order or a delivery is created or their creation can be deferred until the /SCMTMS/SUBSEQUENT_FUB_LOGINT is executed. The latter option gives a possibility to consolidate multiple source documents into a single freight unit.

Freight units are transportation units are different objects. Freight unit is a transportation requirement, whereas transportation unit is already a planning object, that consolidates freight units. Transportation units are optional.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Transfer of inspection lot status - skip lot - from ERP to DM
entry.content:
Hi DM experts,

Is there a possibility to transfer the status skip lot (SKIP) of an inspection lot within the production order download from the ERP system to DM?

Thanks for any advice!

Best regards
Gizem

entry.title: Re: Backup failing insecure ssfs
entry.content:
Login with <SID>adm

bwsas:~ # su - bwsadm
bwsas:HDB:bwsadm /usr/sap/BWS/HDB02 52> cdexe
bwsas:HDB:bwsadm /usr/sap/BWS/SYS/exe/hdb 52> ./hdbcons -e hdbnameserver -i 02 -S BWS


SAP HANA DB Management Client Console (type '\?' to get help for client commands)
Try to open connection to server process 'hdbnameserver' on system 'BWS', instance '02' and tenant 'BWS'
SAP HANA DB Management Server Console (type 'help' to get help for server commands)

Executable: hdbnameserver (PID: 27570)

Service: nameserver@bwsas:30201 (DB#1: SYSTEMDB)
[OK]
--
> crypto ssfs resetConsistency
## Start command at: 2025-01-10 09:53:54.040

This command will completely rewrite the consistency informations about the ssfs, please ensure that this is
the last resort for fixing the ssfs and you did all means to restore the consistent ssfs.

If you are sure about this, call the command again within 20s to rewrite ssfs consistency information.
[OK]
## Finish command at: 2025-01-10 09:53:54.040 command took: 9.000 usec

--

> crypto ssfs resetConsistency

## Start command at: 2025-01-10 09:53:56.617
rewriting ssfs consistency information ...
done.
[OK]
## Finish command at: 2025-01-10 09:53:56.636 command took: 19.442 msec
--
> exit
[EXIT]

--
[BYE]
bwsas:HDB:bwsadm /usr/sap/BWS/SYS/exe/hdb 53>

 

🙂Issue resolved check backup

entry.title: Re: librfc32 on 64bit support
entry.content:
Hi Raul,

1. I think LIBRFC is part of the SAP kernel, you can check in the SAP support software download LIBRFC64

2. You can refer to the SAP Note 3488335 for LIBRFC32 

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: BAPI for MB52 and MMSC
entry.content: @NTeunckens  Thanks .. its work..

entry.title: Re: How to Disable and enable replication in HANA DB when primary secondary and tertiary nodes are p
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for the information. But I am using SAP Hana 2.00.073 sp07 and the register command does not work. When we updated it as follows and tried again, we resolved the problem. For your information,

The error we received;

corrected command;

hdbnsutil -sr_register --name=Site3 --remoteHost=<Hostname of Secondary DB> --remoteInstance=<Instance number of Secondary DB> --replicationMode=Async --operationMode=logreplay



Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...
entry.content: Hi, I don't know if you found the answer already, but I'm facing the same issue, even with the same API. I had to change to HTTP Post, instead of using oData v4, so I could get the error response body.

entry.title: How to remove the "Add Benefit Employee Claim Detail" button
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

This question is regarding SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Global Benefits. We were wondering about the best practices around removing the"Add Benefit Employee Claim Detail" button in the Benefit Claim UI. So far, we have set up a save rule in the Benefit Employee Claim object to prevent users from submitting multiple requests in a single submission, but we want to fully remove this option.

We have considered changing the association multiplicity between benefitEmployeeClaimDetail and benefitFuelReimbursementClaimDetail from "One to Many" to "One to One", but the system will not allow it: 

 

Has anyone done this previously? I would appreciate any feedback/advise on how to proceed around this to prevent any disruptions or data loss.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: How Extend and keep the validation the standard fiori...
entry.content:
@Anjan_3331 
One possible solution is to create a Metadata Extension for the consumption view and add @Consumption.filter.mandatory annotation to the fields that are mandatory.

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...
entry.content:
Hi Miranda,

Yes, I found a solution. Here is the groovy script. You can use this script for Odata V4 Adapter error handling.

 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message;
import java.util.HashMap;
import org.apache.http.StatusLine;
import org.apache.olingo.client.api.communication.ODataClientErrorException;
import org.apache.olingo.commons.api.ex.ODataError;
def Message processData(Message message) {
    // get a map of properties
    def map = message.getProperties();

 

    // get an exception java class instance
    def ex = map.get("CamelExceptionCaught");
    if (ex != null) {
        // ex               -> org.apache.camel.RuntimeCamelException
        // ex.getCause()    -> com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exceptions.OData4Exception
        //ex.getCause().getCause() -> com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exception.ODataProcessingException
        def odataException = ex.getCause().getCause();
        //message.setProperty("Exception for OData", odataException.getClass().getCanonicalName());
        // an odata v4 adapter throws an instance of com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exceptions.ODataProcessingException
        if (odataException.getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("com.sap.gw.core.ip.exception.ODataResponseParsingException") || odataException.getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("com.sap.gateway.core.ip.component.exception.ODataProcessingException")) {

 

            message.setProperty("http.response", message.getBody());
            message.setProperty("ODataProcessingException.Cause", odataException.getCause().getClass().getCanonicalName());
            if (odataException.getCause().getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("org.apache.olingo.client.api.communication.ODataClientErrorException")) {
                message.setProperty("http.statusLine", odataException.getCause().getStatusLine()); //To get HTTP status
                message.setProperty("http.statusCode", odataException.getCause().getStatusLine().getStatusCode().toString()); //To get HTTP status code

 

                message.setProperty("ODataError", odataException.getCause().getODataError());
                message.setProperty("ODataError.Message", odataException.getCause().getODataError().getMessage());
                message.setProperty("ODataError.Code", odataException.getCause().getODataError().getCode());
                message.setProperty("ODataError.InnerError", odataException.getCause().getODataError().getInnerError().toString());
            } else if (odataException.getCause().getClass().getCanonicalName().equals("org.apache.olingo.client.api.communication.ODataServerErrorException")) {
                message.setProperty("http.statusLine", odataException.getCause().getMessage());
            }

 

        }
    }

 

    return message;
}

entry.title: Re: Disabling SSH-RSA algorithms to be compliant with SWI...
entry.content:

Check whether this SAP Note 3294832 is useful or not.

Hi Kiran/Francisco:

   Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Query determine previous scenario-year according the...
entry.content: see file

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10 SP 4211, SLD installation/upgrade...
entry.content:
Hi vinayhatwal

It seems that b1CA.cer is missing in the trusted root certification authorities. Please refer to SAP KBA 3537539 - SAP Business One requires a valid SSL certificate, Step 4 

4. Keep the b1CA.key and b1server.key files safely stored and private.

        Distribute b1CA.cer to all servers, computers and mobile devices across your environment.

        In Windows environment, install the certificate to "Trusted Root Certification Authorities\Certificates".

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Is it necessary to separate B1i application and datab...
entry.content:
Hi ssab_wenx

For optimal performance, please install Integration framework on seperate server.

Also check SAP note   2130388  for the "XCE208 resource is busy" error.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: 2LIS_02_SGR initialization issue
entry.content: Hi Kiran: We have same issue, 2LIS_02_SGR is activated (green) in LBWE, but is red in RSA6 and I'm be able to activate it. Did you solved it?

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @kristiyan,

GA of TomEE 10.0.0 was officially announced by Apache on December 20. See also: Apache TomEE

So - yes, we have it in our plans with high priority. It will be available in SAP Java Buildpack 2 sometime in February.

Best regards, Gergana

Have a look on SAP note 2268956.

Nidhi

entry.title: Re: SAP Build work zone, SAPUI5 app, controller not execu...
entry.content: 2025-01-15 16:18:28.652199 [FUTURE FATAL] sap.ui.core.Fragment: An Error occured during XML processing of 'workflow.workflow.view.fragment.EditPaths' with id '__fragment0' - ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/m/TimePicker.js' -> 'sap/m/DateTimeField.js' -> 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Failed to execute 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:". ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/m/TimePicker.js' -> 'sap/m/DateTimeField.js' -> 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Failed to execute 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:". at ve (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:6909) at he.failWith (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:4785) at https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:17456 at Oe (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:15922) at Me (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:17410) at Te (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:18482) at De (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:14619) at Ie (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:12536) at Object.Ce [as requireSync] (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:19939) at oe (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/ui/core/library-preload.js:784:8709) Caused by: ModuleError: Failed to execute 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:". at ve (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:6909) at he.failWith (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:4785) at De (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:15245) at Ie (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:13870) at Oe (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:15818) at Me (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:17410) at Te (https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.131.1/resources/sap/fiori/appruntime-min-0.js:15:18482) at De entry.title: Automation Pilot URL '****' is malformed
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

after using the example Command from "automation-pilot-examples/mass-stop-start-hana-cloud at main · SAP-samples/automation-pilot-examples · GitHub" I get an error saying the URL is malformed. There is no further information and the Step Logs dont show anything.

All i have to input is the HanaServiceKey and the CF user to authenticate. So i wonder what I am doing wrong.

 

Greetings
Rouven

entry.title: Re: Unable to Retrieve Roles and Groups from IAS in UI5/C...
entry.content: Thanks, but how can i use this API in my UI5 application to fetch the logged in user details.The IAS is configured in BTP and the user logs in to the UI5/CAP application through IAS which is a custom IDP.Once the user is authenticated i want to read the user information,roles and groups assigned to the logged in user directly from my UI5/CAP application.
